calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Maguire for Katherine Castillo. Frank Castillo (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona. Lana J. Gomez (Sister of Frank) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Gomez stated that Frank was 40 years old. Frank stated that he understood the reason why he was in Court, that he understood that he had a right to an accounting, that he understood what it meant for the Trustees to not account to the Court and that he understood that the Trustees would not have to tell the Court about fees. In addition, he stated that it was okay for the Trustees to not put up a bond, that he was okay with Lana being the Trustee and with Lana naming someone else. The language in the order will be changed to state that no contributions are to be made to the Special Needs Trust account without a court order. The Court granted the Petition to Establish a Special Needs Trust (subject to review/modification of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
